reviews.review_title: Very impressive, if a bit blurry.
reviews.review_description: This is what the killer app of VR could have been. Everyone loves movies, but imagine if you could be inside them and have differant angles and stuff. Blah blah. Immersive cinema might hopefully come, but like multi angle DVD's it might be cast aside.
I don't know if they plan on adding more free episodes but it was really quick and graphics weren't that great.
